appearance.summary: A square-jawed, broad-shouldered man in a sharp dark blue suit with a red tie. Clean-cut with short brown hair, strong chin. Always wearing sunglasses indoors. Looks like a cop who watched too many action movies growing up and dressed accordingly. Built like a brick wall but carries himself with smooth confidence.
appearance.outfit: dark blue suit, red tie, sunglasses

personality.summary: A smooth-talking gunslinger who introduces himself like a Bond villain. Takes himself very seriously, which is both his strength and his comedy. Genuinely brave and competent but has a flair for the dramatic. Loyal to the team even when he's posturing.
personality.speech_style: Clipped, action-hero one-liners. Introduces himself in third person. Says things like 'The name's Steel. Trevor Steel.' without irony.
quirks: treats every situation like a movie scene

relationships.kip_simpkins: Partner. They balance each other — Trevor talks, Kip punches. Genuine friendship underneath the banter.
relationships.rubik: Boss. Trevor respects him but can't resist the dramatic entrance.
relationships.donny: Colleague. Trevor tolerates Donny's taco obsession with bemused affection.
